summary: Detailed implementation plan for adding multiple named budgets (wallets) to the Android budget manager app, covering database migration, new BudgetEntity/DAO/Repository/ViewModel layers, ActiveBudgetManager singleton for budget switching via DataStore-backed StateFlow, budget-scoped filtering across all existing DAOs and ViewModels, top-bar dropdown UI, budget management screen, migration dialog for existing users, and backup/restore compatibility.
migrationSteps: Insert default 'My Budget' if existing data exists
Add budget_id to transactions with DEFAULT 0
Add budget_id to recurring_transactions with DEFAULT 0
Update all existing rows to reference default budget
